headline: Andoni Iraola
body: New Liverpool head coach Andoni Iraola needs to appoint a new vice-captain following Andy Robertson’s departure. Assessing the merits of the four main contenders to be Virgil van Dijk’s deputy in 2026-27. (Free to read) nytimes.com/athletic/7425155… Link Liverpool have a vacancy for a vice-captain. These are the contenders (Gift Article) Jurgen Klopp left an impressive leadership group at Anfield when he left two years ago, but now only Virgil van Dijk and Alisson remain nytimes.com
raw_text:
New Liverpool head coach Andoni Iraola needs to appoint a new vice-captain following Andy Robertson’s departure. 
Assessing the merits of the four main contenders to be Virgil van Dijk’s deputy in 2026-27.
